description.zh: 晋朝以九品中正制选拔官员，由中正官按家世、行状、才能品评人物，分为九等授官。实际运行中逐渐演变为「上品无寒门，下品无士族」的门阀政治。中央权力孱弱，地方都督、刺史各据一方，清谈玄学之风盛行。
description.en: The Jin Dynasty selected officials through the Nine-Rank System, where Arbiter officials assessed candidates based on family background, conduct, and talent across nine grades. In practice, this devolved into aristocratic gate-clan politics where elite families monopolized high offices. Central authority was weak while regional military governors held real power. Xuanxue (Neo-Daoist) philosophical discourse flourished.
